title: Micro Teleporters
description: Quickly teleport anywhere with Micro Teleporters
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf4878c2616a2cb96f0420cf4f1ea3ed57c05a95.png)
Micro Teleporters is a mod that enables users to easily teleport throughout the Minecraft world. Whether it's between being at your base and going on adventure or it's between being at the entrance of your mine or deep inside of it.

The main items of intrest are:

## The Travler's stone
![traveler's stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c93fba274c5134eb700cc5196dc46349ad12bda3.png)

An unbreakable teleporter which allows you to quickly switch between two locations.

## Home Crystals
![home crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee18a5005088fe16217e975be36e8504c55d052.png)

Home crystals are one time use teleporters which can be set by right clicking once and can be used by right clicking again.

## Temporary Travler's Stone
![Temporary Travler's Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6feae607cedb4797484ad025f0f1aff9f5cb10a3.png)

The temporary travler's stone allows for 10 uses before it eventually runs out of durrability and disappears.

## Permanent Telestick
![telestick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/768807e3820f8d5e16b44d2234f7027ad74e270c.png)

The permant telestick is a tool used to teleport mobs to wherever you want. Simply right click to select a location and then hit the mob with this stick.

## Temporary Telestick
![temporary telestick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab9a65a8f608d754061363691a144b0ad3e36ce7.png)

This one has most of the main features of the Permanent varient with the major differences:
- It can only be set once
- Max 10 uses

Enjoy!
